description: Default capabilities for every DTH Character Studio window (Home + per-project). NOTE: the fs `**` + `/**` scopes below let the webview read/write/delete anywhere via the fs plugin WITHOUT any Rust command, so the Rust recursive-delete rails are defense against a poisoned settings.json/.dcsp, not against the webview — the real mitigation is the strict CSP in tauri.conf.json. Both globs are required: a not-yet-existing path can't be canonicalised, so the fs plugin scope-checks it as a RAW string, and bare `**` doesn't match a POSIX absolute path's leading `/` (that's `/**`) — without it, creating any new nested path on macOS/Linux fails with 'forbidden path'. This breadth is accepted risk (see CLAUDE.md); do not weaken the scopes. Full write-up: docs/devops.md → 'Security posture'.
